title: Incorrect result when using unnamed "?" bindings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), email VARCHAR UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('John Doe', 30, 'john.doe@example.com');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age > 18;
key_bug_features: Unnamed "?" bindings cause incorrect query results
